allow: Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./data/products.en.json'\); const t = data.find\(p => p.slug === 'tree-of-life-wooden-coasters'\); const s = data.find\(p => p.slug === 'sun-and-moon-wooden-coasters'\); console.log\('tree-of-life chips:', t.chips\); console.log\('sun-and-moon chips:', s.chips\);")

Bash(python3 -c " from PIL import Image import os, glob imgs = glob.glob\('assets/img/products/*.jpg'\) + glob.glob\('assets/img/products/*.png'\) for f in sorted\(imgs\): try: im = Image.open\(f\) w, h = im.size ratio = w/h shape = 'portrait' if ratio < 0.9 else \('square' if ratio < 1.1 else 'landscape'\) print\(f'{os.path.basename\(f\):45s} {w}x{h} {ratio:.2f} {shape}'\) except: print\(f'{f}: error'\) ")
